title: thelypteris standleyi
intro: Thelypteris standleyi, also known as Standley's fern, is a species of fern native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris standleyi include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
